milestoneTitle: Phase M9.13a — Tighter activation, stronger edge vignette. Observer band tightens from ~50% (rootMargin -25% top/bottom) to ~35% (-32.5% top/bottom) so only content near the true vertical center of the viewport reaches the lifted state. The html::after vignette peak alpha bumps from 0.13 to 0.24 at the exact top/bottom edges with a 3-stop falloff (0.24 → 0.14 → 0.06 → transparent at 25%) instead of the softer 2-stop curve — near-edge dimming is now noticeably more impactful while the center 50% clear zone is unchanged. Purely parameter tuning on the same M9.13 architecture; no new rules, no new animation surfaces.
